headline: HSR Revival Proposal Sets RM68 Billion Price Tag
context: Malaysia and Singapore resumed KL-Singapore High Speed Rail discussions in March 2026 with updated RM68 billion cost estimate.

cards.big: KL-Singapore HSR revival talks resume with RM68 billion cost estimate
cards.sub: Project shelved in 2021 could connect capitals in 90 minutes if approved

cards.big: Malaysia would bear RM52 billion for 335km through 8 stations
cards.sub: Compensation of RM320 million paid to Singapore in 2021 for cancellation

cards.big: Ridership study projects 35,000 daily passengers generating RM2.8 billion revenue
cards.sub: Critics argue projections are optimistic given airline competition at RM100-200

cards.big: Japan and China both submitted preliminary proposals for construction contract
cards.sub: Geopolitical considerations may weigh as heavily as technical merit in selection

cards.big: HSR revival tests whether political will can sustain a cross-border mega-project
RM68 billion HSR demands ridership projections that justify the cost — not the other way around.
